values.meaning: typed use of reflection or runtime-introspection APIs
generated output still contains raw fallback expression nodes
typed code crosses a Dynamic-compatible runtime boundary
a compile-time compatibility toggle weakens metal-clean enforcement
group of reflection and runtime-introspection blockers
group of raw code-generation fallback blockers
group of Dynamic-compatible boundary blockers
group of fallback-policy toggle blockers
blocker category that lacks an admitted typed issue-class mapping

deterministicOrdering: globalBlockers and module blockers use weight-descending then id ordering
issueClasses use total-weight-descending then id ordering
modules use score-ascending then module-path ordering

values.meaning: typed usage of this backend's rust.* native surface
typed usage of a different target-native namespace
entry came from Haxe/Reflaxe typed module usage
portable Haxe facade with an admitted backend representation
unsupported lowering must fail or emit a semantic runtime-requirement reason
representation was selected from an explicit facade admission

deterministicOrdering: native import hits, consumed surfaces, representation decisions, warnings, and errors are sorted by their documented stable keys

values.meaning: Haxe object identity requires runtime-managed reference semantics
shared reference mutation requires runtime-managed storage
Dynamic-compatible values require runtime representation
reflection or runtime introspection requires runtime support
anonymous runtime objects require runtime object storage
Haxe exception payload semantics require runtime support
nullable compatibility mode requires runtime-backed null representation
captured shared mutation requires a runtime-managed closure cell
portable platform APIs require a runtime abstraction
Haxe Array semantics require runtime array representation
Haxe String compatibility requires runtime string representation
the generated crate omits the bundled Haxe runtime
the hxrt dependency uses its default Cargo feature set
the hxrt dependency uses an explicitly selected feature set
feature selection follows typed module usage
feature selection follows an explicit compiler define
feature selection follows an internal hxrt feature dependency

deterministicOrdering: manual and selected features are lexicographically sorted
feature reasons and runtime requirements are sorted by their documented tuple keys
fallback reason kinds are unique and lexicographically sorted

values.meaning: normalizes the lowered Rust AST before later optimization passes
removes or reshapes statements made redundant by diverging control flow
infers emitted Rust local mutability
removes proven-unnecessary clone operations
shortens eligible generated borrow lifetimes
audits metal output for forbidden fallback shapes
an immediately consumed borrow alias was inlined
a tail-expression borrow alias was inlined
a clone at the last-use Dynamic conversion boundary was removed
a clone at a last-use match scrutinee was removed
a clone of a literal value was removed
a redundant nested clone was collapsed
a desugared Array loop now iterates through a borrowed view
a direct Array loop now iterates through a borrowed view
loop-local immediate borrow alias tightening was applied
loop-local tail borrow alias tightening was applied
the borrow alias remains live after its immediate consumer
the immediate consumer shape cannot safely inline the borrow
the tail consumer contains a closure boundary
the tail borrow target is not an admitted rewrite target
the tail borrow alias is not consumed exactly once
last-use Dynamic conversion analysis lacked an enabled function context
the Dynamic conversion operand has no tracked local binding
the Dynamic conversion operand is used multiple times in its expression
the Dynamic conversion operand cannot be moved safely
the Dynamic conversion operand is not a simple local path
the Dynamic conversion operand is read after the statement
the match scrutinee has no tracked local binding

the match scrutinee local cannot be moved safely
the match scrutinee is not a simple local path
the match scrutinee local is read after the statement

a desugared Array loop has a mutation or alias hazard
a direct Array loop has a mutation or alias hazard

a loop-local borrow consumer cannot be rewritten safely
a loop tail borrow consumer contains a closure boundary
a loop tail borrow target is not an admitted rewrite target
a loop tail borrow alias is not consumed exactly once

deterministicOrdering: executed passes preserve compiler pipeline order
applied and skipped metric entries are sorted by metric id

protectedContract: Cargo.toml and src/main.rs are emitted at the generated crate root
the default output is a Rust 2021 binary crate
default generated app and hxrt manifests declare the minimum supported rust-version from rust-toolchain-policy.json
default generated app and hxrt manifests select Cargo resolver 3 from rust-toolchain-policy.json
the application Cargo.lock is project-owned, preserved across regeneration, committed after review, and consumed with --locked in CI and release builds
rust_crate controls the generated Cargo package name
the default runtime-backed crate includes ./hxrt and its path dependency
documented Cargo subcommands and flags are forwarded and non-zero Cargo status fails Haxe compilation
the four admitted JSON report filenames are emitted at the crate root when enabled
rust_nested_modules emits package-shaped Rust source paths
root compatibility alias modules remain available for documented handwritten extra-source migration
eligible metal rust_no_hxrt output omits the hxrt dependency and bundled hxrt subtree
generated no-hxrt source contains no hxrt paths
ineligible runtime-dependent programs fail before a misleading runtime-free crate is admitted
exclusions: blanket Haxe semantic parity without hxrt

protectedContract: structured @:rustCargo declarations merge compatible dependency fields and feature sets deterministically
conflicting structured dependency declarations fail compilation
rust_cargo_toml copies the consumer-owned manifest and substitutes {{crate_name}} only
@:rustExtraSrc, @:rustExtraSrcDir, and rust_extra_src copy admitted Rust modules and include their module declarations
exclusions: semantic validity of consumer-authored Rust or Cargo TOML
raw-string Cargo declarations beyond literal passthrough

protectedContract: @:rustTest metadata forms, validation, serial default, and native cargo test behavior are public
the generated __hx_tests wrapper name and internal layout are private
the release asset is a deterministic safe-path Haxelib-shaped ZIP
the package installs through Haxelib/lix and compiles with -lib reflaxe.rust
packaged src/**/*.cross.hx files are staged with the documented transformation
compiler src, runtime, and vendor roots plus staged version and release provenance metadata are present
source-checkout and installed-package classpath behavior remain documented and tested
exclusions: archive compressor implementation details that do not change deterministic bytes
